function.message: The new owner model is not elegant, but it survived a messy week. I will take ugly and real over clean and fake.
function.rulebook_notes: Loaded root and nested AGENTS.MD files before task work, resolved canonical identity via cast record, then read every channel transcript fully to find latest attributed message.
function.outcome_justification: 10_entities/cast/omar.md establishes Omar Haddad / alias omar; across all channel transcripts, Omar-attributed entries appear in 60_outbox/channels/dockflow_ops_slack.md, with the latest dated 2026-05-09 and message quoted exactly.
